fit_notes: Micro NEMT/special-needs operator (~6 employees, ~$600K rev) primarily Medicaid-driven, not a yellow-bus district contractor. Weak fit for Summit School Services platform; more relevant to NEMT roll-ups than school-bus consolidation.
